description: Recto: Letter from Yefet b. David, Tyre, to his father, David b. Shekhanya, Fustat, informing him of his arrival in Tyre and expressing his disappointment at finding only two letters waiting for him. Greetings are sent to various family members. Dated ca. 1007 or 1010 CE. Verso: Address in Arabic along with a draft of a document in a different hand. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב מיפת בן דוד, צור, לאביו דוד בן שכניה, פוסטאט. מדווח על הגיעתו לצור ואכזבתו שמצא רק שני מכתבים. כ-1007 או 1010.
